column2: Track every hour. Measure your mood. Make data-informed decisions.
Mon → Fri tabs : Log each activity as it happens. Fill in Start, End, Activity, Delegate?, and Mood.
Weekly Summary tab: Your totals and mood averages auto-calculate. Review at end of week.
Reflection tab:  5 questions + 3 commitments. Fill out Friday evening.
Claude Prompts tab : Copy-paste prompts to analyze your week with AI.
1–4   Draining. You leave feeling worse than you arrived.
5–6   Below baseline. Tolerable but not energizing.
7      Neutral baseline. Solid, steady, on-par. This is your objective.
8–9   Energized. You are in your element.
10     Peak state. Note what made it possible.
TIP: Export any day tab as CSV and attach it to Claude or similar. See the Claude Prompts tab for what to ask.
